MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bobby Lydon-Lam appearing via zoom for Helen Ng (petitioner).

The Court acknowledged the filing that was submitted on Friday, and that the document has not been processed. First two-year accounting and petition for approval is continued to October 10, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Yang. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Two-Year Account Or A Petition For Final Distribution On Waivers Of Account
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bobby Lydon-Lam, via Zoom, for Helen Ng, Administrator.

The court and counsel discuss the delay in the administration of this matter, and of the notice issues, and of the failure to provide courtesy copies of the instant petition and a proposed order thereon to the court. Counsel reports on the delays.

After additional discussion, the court takes the instant petition off calendar. A Status on the filing of a two-year account or a petition for final distribution on waivers of account is set for Nov-02-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. William Barry. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-16-2022 Continued To Jun-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-16-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bobby Lydon-Lam appeared by zoom for Helen Ng (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it is concerned as to whether enough efforts were made to track down heirs. Mr. Lam stated that they hired heirsearch.com, that it took two years and that the latest report indicates their search efforts. Mr. Lam also stated that heirsearch.com searched public records in this Country and in Canada, and that they spoke with family members. The Court noted that no one is present to object. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 13, 2018 is admitted to probate. Helen Ng is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 16, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar Apr-03-2019 Continued To Jun-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bobby Lydon-Lam for Helen Ng (Petitioner).

Mr. Lydon-Lam requested a three month continuance to work on locating heirs, and stated that the Petitioner is not requesting any money and that she will pay for the search from the trust. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to June 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
